category_sources: Official coin-or/Clp README describes Clp as the COIN-OR linear programming solver.
source_facts.description says Clp is a linear programming solver.
display_name_sources: Official coin-or/Clp README uses the project name Clp.
source_facts.name is clp and source_facts.homepage points to the official coin-or/Clp repository.
docs_sources: Official COIN-OR User Guide is a dedicated Clp documentation page.
Official GitHub README provides current build and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/coin-or/Clp, so repo was returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official coin-or/Clp README describes Clp as an open-source optimization solver written in C++ under COIN-OR.
source_facts.description identifies a linear programming solver.
